title: Create: Genderless
description: An Addon for Create: Estrogen that adds non-binary content, along with new items and more!
body:
Information

This is a FORGE ONLY addon, we recommend using EMI/JEI/REI

An Addon for Create: Estrogen that adds non-binary content, along with new items and more!

Real quick before I get into the content of the mod, I just wish to make one singular thing clear - this is not meant to be taken seriously, I am fully aware that nothing about this particular addon is realistic in the slightest. This is modded Minecraft, let's try to have some fun with it, yeah?

Features

This mod utilises some key features from both the Create: Estrogen and Create: Testosterone, such as the Centrifuge and the respective pills from either mod.

[Pre version 1.1] With the addition of the Genderless Pill and also the Genderfluid Pill, a few different assembly lines and processes have been introduced alongside their respective temporary status effects of Genderless Power and Genderfluidity.

[Version 1.1] The Genderless Pill now grants the Enby Power status effect, allowing you to pogo on certain blocks and entities - perhaps get a bit explosive with it. Additionally, there's the Void Pill, granting the Unified status effect and making you unable to take or to deal damage to other entities.

  • Bra of Holding that provides a sense of Euphoria and rids you of Girl Power

  • New tech opportunities for you programmers... Be so for real right now

  • Genderfluid Pills to randomly change your gender

  • And more to come!

Initial Release Showcase [Pre version 1.1]

 

Extra info

ONE MORE TIME - THIS IS NOT MEANT TO BE TAKEN SERIOUSLY AND WAS MADE IN GOOD FUN. TESTOSTERONE ALREADY STATES THIS, BUT I DO NOT PROMOTE THE USE OF ANABOLIC STEROIDS AS PERFORMANCE ENHANCERS.

Create: Estrogen and Create: Testosterone are still in development and so is Create: Genderless. If you find any bugs or have suggestions please report them to the discord server down below.
